name: Channel Flow
description: Developing Poiseuille (parabolic) velocity profile in a straight channel at Re ≈ 100. Demonstrates wall-bounded internal flow.

product.lesson_headline: Wall friction shapes a smooth channel-flow profile.
product.export_caption: Channel flow: speed builds into a wall-bounded profile.
classroom_prompts: Why is the speed lower near the walls?
What happens to Re when viscosity is doubled?
